title: nvm_list pagination protocol assumption undocumented
description: nvm.rs: The nvm_list loop advances start_id by out_id + 1 each iteration, assuming IDs are returned in ascending order and that start_id selects objects with ID > start_id. This protocol contract is not documented in code. If a wolfHSM server firmware version returns IDs in a different order, or if the semantics of the access/flags filter arguments (passed as 0/0) change, the loop would silently return incomplete results. Add a comment naming the wolfHSM API contract being relied on, citing the C header or wolfHSM docs, so a contributor can verify whether this assumption still holds when porting to a new server version.
